Run the project
===============

main-func
---------
.. important::
   Read `the rule <./installation.html>`_ to create the configuration (in the file) of the bot [1]_ and 'How to launch/run the bot?'.

-----

.. automodule:: main
   :members:
   :private-members:

-----

.. [1] Telegram Bot API. API for the telegram bot(s).
   An API key is required for use (both through requests and
   through third-party libraries: pyTelegramBotAPI, aiogram and others)
